crime.value: Serial murders of young girls including strangulation and stabbing
crime.quote: The attacker grabbed Claire by her neck once more and strangled her until she had no breath to spare.

victim.value: Claire, a 14-year-old girl, and later her friend Sabrina - targeted due to their vulnerability as young girls
victim.quote: She look into his eyes, so pathetic to kidnap such a young girl who's 14 years old.

closed_world.value: School/dormitory environment where the victims and perpetrator are connected through family relationships
closed_world.quote: We walked to our dorm talking about all the times we embarrassed ourselves in public.

culprit_and_motive.value: Amanda's father - motive appears to be serial predatory behavior targeting young girls
culprit_and_motive.quote: DAD!!! Tear streamed down my cheeks like the flames of fires.

resolution.value: The killer is caught by police after Amanda escapes and calls 911, though she is shot in the process
resolution.quote: The cops came immediately. And saw my dad. 'THERE HE IS GET HIM GET HIM!!'

investigator.value: Amanda, the victim's sister, who seeks revenge and justice for Claire's murder
investigator.quote: This is my chance to find the killer!!!!!!!!!

suspect_architecture.value: Limited suspect pool: Logan (party host with access to victims), unnamed attacker from flashback, father revealed as killer
suspect_architecture.quote: DAD!!! Tear streamed down my cheeks like the flames of fires. How, How, How could you do this to me and Claire

red_herring.value: Logan positioned as romantic interest and party host to misdirect from family connection
red_herring.quote: This is my chance to find the killer!!!!!!!!!! I gave him back the note. I whispered to him, 'Sure, I would love too.'

social_world.value: School/dormitory setting with parent-child authority structures and peer social dynamics
social_world.quote: Maybe that's why Sabrina's mom was mad at Sabrina. Just because she was friends with me.

reveal_mechanic.value: Direct confrontation with flashlight illumination revealing father's identity as the killer
reveal_mechanic.quote: I ran off get a flashlight I saw earlier on the floor and picked it up and shined it on him. 'DAD!!!'

investigator_wound.value: Personal trauma from sister Claire's murder driving Amanda's investigation, family betrayal as ultimate wound
investigator_wound.quote: Claire, my 14 year old sister died just two years ago, and they found her body ten days ago. She still haunts me

_meta.title: ebook sydney st fleur ashes and diamonds
